name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Netcat Execution
notes:
This building block detects suspicious netcat execution.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113, Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Netcat Suspicious Execution
SIGMA Description: Detects execution of Netcat. Adversaries may use a non-application layer protocol for communication between host and C2 server or among infected hosts within a network


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Netcat Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(nc|ncat|netcat)\.exe' AQL filter query

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -lvp %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -lvnp%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -l -v -p %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -lv -p %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -l --proxy-type http %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -vnl --exec %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -vnl -e %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% --lua-exec %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% --sh-exec %' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Netcat Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(nc|ncat|netcat)\.exe' AQL filter query

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -lvp %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -lvnp%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -l -v -p %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -lv -p %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -l --proxy-type http %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -vnl --exec %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% -vnl -e %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% --lua-exec %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% --sh-exec %' AQL filter query
